blocks.text: McIlroy six clear on Moving Day — Arsenal stumble hands City a lifeline
Arsenal's shock 1-2 home defeat to Bournemouth leaves Man City nine points back — with two games in hand. City travel to Stamford Bridge tomorrow. The title race lives.

blocks.label: Sunday
items: ⚽ 17:30 — Chelsea vs Manchester City: City must win to keep Arsenal pressure on
🎾 09:00 — Monte-Carlo Masters opens: Casper Ruud enters as clay-court favourite
